How it works

1
Select your health board
Choose your health board to see local booking codes and procedure times.
2
Search the procedure
Type the procedure name, clinical shorthand (TURP, lap chole), or OPCS code directly.
3
Copy the booking code
Get your local SPP code and procedure times. One click to copy into your system.
